name: add_asset
_note: add_asset writes an asset into the caller's in-memory estate (globalThis._concordSTATE.inheritanceEstates, scoped to the assassin's internal owner actor). label is required (missing_label). valueCc is fail-CLOSED via badCc() BEFORE the asset is created — a poisoned value (NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308/>1e6) returns ok:false 'invalid numeric field: valueCc' so it can never inflate totalAssetValueCc / byCategory sums. A bounded value <= 1e6 is accepted and clamped >= 0. No real wallet/ledger CC is minted; the estate value is the exact sum of stored asset valueCc fields.
